requirements.summary: Add clickable Facebook link to Footer social links section
acceptanceCriteria: Facebook icon appears in the Footer social links alongside existing social icons
Clicking the Facebook icon opens https://www.facebook.com/share/1BrQ3UHjDK/ in a new browser tab
The link uses appropriate accessible attributes (aria-label, rel="noopener noreferrer")
Visual style matches existing social link icons in the Footer

file_operations.description: Add a Facebook link to the social links section that opens https://www.facebook.com/share/1BrQ3UHjDK/ in a new tab. Use the same icon library and styling pattern as existing social links (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram). Include aria-label="Visit our Facebook page" and rel="noopener noreferrer" for accessibility and security. Match the visual style of existing social icons including size, spacing, and hover effects.
